text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day as I'm walking around the<n>academy...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm Fine Motion and thank you for<n>coming! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Phew!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh? That was rather refined.<n>Practicing for your
concert, I take it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Groove! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying out different things to make<n>the crowd
go wild.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to start over. Do you mind<n>watching
me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Seems like you're quite serious, so<n>sure. Show
me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Okay. Ahem...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hey there! Pull uppa seat!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
All right, everyone! It's the moment<n>you've been
waiting for! Give it up<n>for Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You know what's a "fine" deal? The<n>fried rice set!
Enjoy a noodle refill on<n>the house!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's me, everyone! Thanks for<n>coming out!
What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I have so many questions. First,what was that speech?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you picked up on the trick? I knew<n>nothing
would get past you! Every<n>performance needs a
hook, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And I thought to myself: who better<n>to reference
than ramen shop<n>owners, calling out to
passersby?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
They always catch my attention, so<n>the
technique's sure to stop people in<n>their tracks!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I have to ask. You're not just<n>messing with me,
are you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No way! My goal is to make all my<n>fans super
excited! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Then why the act? You don't have to<n>be eccentric
to make them happy.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's exactly the kind of tip I<n>need! I'm not
used to gathering<n>people's attention myself.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I have experience receiving guests,but that's not quite the same asinviting them, is it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I can improve my acting<n>with your
advice! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I get that you're trying your best, so<n>let me see it
one more time. I'll give<n>you an honest critique.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Thank you! Before I jump in, can<n>I ask one
thing first?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Do you think they'd prefer a free<n>portion size
upgrade over a free<n>noodle refill?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Neither! Get your mind off ramen and<n>focus on the
performance!
